concepts.title: Presheaves and sheaf condition
concepts.blurb: Sheaf axioms encode local-to-global compatibility for sections over open covers.

concepts.title: Stalks and local behavior
concepts.blurb: Stalks isolate infinitesimal data at points and detect local properties.

concepts.title: Sheafification and quasi-coherent sheaves
concepts.blurb: Sheafification enforces gluing; quasi-coherent sheaves globalize module theory on schemes.
